source: Oracle's Elixir primary with Leaguepedia Cargo gap-fill

sources.name: Oracle's Elixir CSV: 2025_LoL_esports_match_data_from_OraclesElixir.csv
sources.description: 2354 rated games retained from 10038 Oracle's Elixir imports after the published team-universe filter. Aggregated by Oracle's Elixir / Tim Sevenhuysen. Subject to Riot game-data policies.

warnings.message: Oracle primary data was refreshed through 2026-06-28; the existing Leaguepedia backup file was preserved because the live Leaguepedia refresh was rate-limited on 2026-06-28.

sources.name: Oracle's Elixir CSV: 2026_LoL_esports_match_data_from_OraclesElixir.csv

warnings.message: Oracle primary data was refreshed through 2026-06-28; the existing Leaguepedia backup file was preserved because the live Leaguepedia refresh was rate-limited on 2026-06-28.

sources.name: Leaguepedia Cargo: scoreboard-games-2025-01-01_to_2026-06-26.json
sources.description: 3929 rated games retained from 20006 Leaguepedia Cargo imports for requested range 2025-01-01 to 2026-06-26 after the published team-universe filter. Sourced from Leaguepedia Cargo / Leaguepedia contributors under the wiki data terms.

warnings.message: Leaguepedia was downloaded via Special:CargoExport instead of api.php cargoquery because api.php was rate-limited.
Oracle primary data was refreshed through 2026-06-28; the existing Leaguepedia backup file was preserved because the live Leaguepedia refresh was rate-limited on 2026-06-28.

sources.name: Leaguepedia Cargo API
sources.description: Planned canonical source for broad historical events, teams, players, rosters, and match metadata.

sources.name: Oracle's Elixir CSVs
sources.description: Primary planned source for game-level and player-level stats from yearly CSV snapshots.

parameters.latentStrengthBudgetShareSemantics: teamStable/teamForm split remaining team-local evidence after eligible league-anchor reservations

playerRatingPredictionPolicy.description: Sourced prior-only player ratings are published because the walk-forward gate cleared after Oracle player-stat coverage was added.

executionResidualPredictionPolicy.description: Execution-residual ratings are trained from post-game stat residuals, but remain shadow-only until walk-forward gates clear across cross-region and patch-transition slices.

tier-one.label: Tier-one major
tier-one.description: Globally anchored leagues with regular international title contention.

tier-two.label: Tier-two major
tier-two.description: Major-region leagues with recurring international representation but lower title baseline.

tier-three.label: Tier-three regional
tier-three.description: First-division minor or merged regional leagues that need current international signal for global-board certainty.

emerging.label: Emerging or academy
emerging.description: Developmental, national, academy, ERL, lower-division, or lower-connectivity leagues.

unknown.label: Unknown
unknown.description: League identity is missing or not mapped to a competitive tier.

regionTaxonomy.source: Riot LoL Esports top-level region menu and LCP format update
regionTaxonomy.policy: Region Power is limited to current international-participant top-tier regions. Domestic feeder and lower-tier ecosystems remain available for team scopes but are ignored for Region Power calculations unless they are part of the region power league layer.

ratingUniverse.sideRule: A match enters the published rating run only when both sides resolve to a rated domestic home league.
ratingUniverse.teamRule: A team enters the published rating run only when its resolved league is one of the rated team leagues.

notes: 216 matches are missing side-selection metadata; these rows cannot train side priors.
432 team-sides have no sourced roster snapshot; roster continuity falls back to assumed/unknown basis.

playerData.description: Oracle's Elixir player rows provide observed game rosters, value-weighted roster continuity for team ratings, Role Power player ratings, and gated prior-only player-rating prediction adjustments. Role Power includes team-result signal and is not independent best-in-role proof.

metric.label: Role Power
metric.description: Role-conditioned player rating from sourced game stats.
metric.interpretation: This metric includes team-result signal and should not be read as independent best-in-role proof.

awardSignals.description: Oracle CSVs and Leaguepedia ScoreboardGames do not provide dated human MVP/POG/All-Pro signal in this local pipeline, so AwardResidualZ remains unapplied instead of inferred from visible stats.

baselineComparisons.label: Coin flip
baselineComparisons.description: Always predicts 50 percent for team A; verifies the model clears a no-skill game-level baseline.

baselineComparisons.label: Pre-game win rate
baselineComparisons.description: Uses only each team cumulative pre-game record with Laplace smoothing; ignores opponent strength, league strength, side, roster, patch, and uncertainty.

baselineComparisons.label: Team-only model
baselineComparisons.description: Uses the neutral team and league rating spine before player-rating, execution-residual, and side-context variants.
